title: Alpine Lift Circuit: Overnight Inspection Route
strategies: roster order: inspect stations in listed order (identity permutation); reproduces the evaluator's do-nothing baseline circuit and scores ~0.1
greedy nearest-station chain: from the depot repeatedly drive to the closest un-inspected station; large win over the roster order but leaves long crossing return hops
nearest-neighbour + 2-opt: uncross circuit edges by reversing segments whenever it shortens the closed tour, iterating under a fixed pass budget; clears the greedy chain
multi-restart / or-opt refinement: seed several starts and add single-station relocations plus 2-opt within the op budget to squeeze out remaining slack, staying below the loose lower bound
